name: Aardvark Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapies for metabolic diseases. The company's lead product candidate is ARD-101, an oral small molecule that modulates gastrointestinal satiety pathways. Aardvark Therapeutics is headquartered in Shanghai, China and Carmel, Indiana.
